issues.description: Manual arr[i] search inside loop
issues.explanation: Manual scanning inside loop is slow (O(n)). Hashed lookup is O(1).
issues.recommendation: Use Set or Map depending on logic

fix.code: Use Set or Map depending on logic

issues.description: Nested loops detected
issues.explanation: Nested loops cause O(n²) complexity. Converting one list to a Map reduces time to O(n).
issues.recommendation: Use HashMap/HashSet for matching instead of O(n²) nested scans.

fix.code: Use HashMap/HashSet for matching instead of O(n²) nested scans.

issues.description: Array used as dictionary with string key
issues.explanation: Arrays only support numeric indexing. Using them like maps is incorrect.
issues.recommendation: HashMap or TreeMap
